title: Malformed state input guard
description: Harden UE/state-ingestion logic against malformed state text such as missing fields, empty rows, or invalid numeric fields. The project has UE GameStateReader parsing and a client BattleState.txt artifact.
target_area: UE state parser and client state-file compatibility
success_criteria: UE state parsing ignores or reports malformed rows without crashing.
Missing UESTATE fields are checked before numeric conversion.
Server protocol and UE build configuration are not modified.
risk_points: Overly strict filtering can drop valid partial state updates.
UE FString numeric conversion may silently turn malformed values into zero.
